reason: No US Senator or candidate named "Ben Alsobrooks" exists. Likely brief-generator confusion with US Sen. Angela Alsobrooks (D-MD, elected 2024), who is NOT up for re-election on the 2026 ballot. Not on registry.
recommendation: Fix brief generator in main.py to (1) check candidate name against data/candidate_series.json registry before queuing a dossier brief, (2) drop any name from known_events that doesn't resolve to a registered ballot candidate.
